brand.name: Pliny
brand.tagline: An AI second pair of eyes for your code
brand.value_prop: Pliny reviews every pull request the moment it opens — finds bugs, spots regressions, files concrete suggestions. Trained on your codebase.

spec.notes:
WHAT WE'RE BUILDING (product_splash): A cinematic single-product splash page — usually for an AI hardware device or a flagship consumer product launch. The page IS the product. Index is hero + scroll-driven feature beats (each section = one image + one short copy block). Story page is long-form narrative. Specs page is a specification table. Preorder is minimal (email + country). FAQ is a vertical accordion. Press has logos + media mentions. Avoid feature-grid cards; this is intentionally low-density. BRAND: Pliny — "An AI second pair of eyes for your code" Pliny reviews every pull request the moment it opens — finds bugs, spots regressions, files concrete suggestions. Trained on your codebase. VISUAL LANGUAGE (crypto_neon): Background near-pure-black (#000 / #08080C). High-saturation neon accent (palette anchor) used for primary CTAs, glowing data points, animated decorations. Hairline 1px borders (#1A1A22) for cards. Display headlines large with optional neon glow (text-shadow). Body type clean sans at high contrast (#F0F0F8). Decorative motif: abstract 3D blobs / iridescent gradients in palette colors. CTA buttons neon-filled. "Connect wallet" or similar action button prominent. Numerals tabular for chart data. Avoid: warm muted palettes, serif body, default-Tailwind dark-mode (this is louder). DESIGN REFERENCES (style + topic): rabbit.tech, humane.com, teenage.engineering, uniswap.org, ledger.com, magiceden.io PER-PAGE GUIDANCE: - index: Hero is product image + 1-2 line tagline, NO CTA above the fold (the page itself is the CTA). Below: scroll-revealed feature beats — each section a single image + short copy, alternating image-left / image-right. - press: Press logos cluster + recent media mentions list + press contact. - faq: Vertical accordion. ~10 questions, concise answers. - specs: Technical spec table — dimensions, weight, battery, materials. Tabular figures, hairline dividers, no decorations. - preorder: Minimal form — email + (optional) shipping country, oversized CTA, FAQ link. - story: Long-form narrative about the product. Oversized type, photographic interludes. Reads like an essay. IMAGE POLICY (HARD CONSTRAINT): - For purely decorative content (hero illustrations, abstract section dividers, decorative blobs): use NO `` tags. Use CSS gradients, inline SVG, or styled `
` blocks with `background-color` / `aspect-ratio` instead. - For content-essential photography (product photos, dish photos, hotel rooms, portrait avatars, editorial leads), use `` where X is EXCLUSIVELY one of these five filenames: photo-product-1.jpg (generic product / object — warm tones) photo-product-2.jpg (cooler product variant — for grids) photo-portrait-1.jpg (generic person — for avatars / team / bylines) photo-landscape-1.jpg (generic scene — for hero / hospitality leads) illustration-abstract.jpg (mesh-gradient — for splash / decorative hero) - Repeating a filename across multiple `` tags is fine. - ANY OTHER `src=` value will be rejected at validation time. No external URLs, no other filenames, no svg files.
